_comment: Project-level configuration. Create a directory per project under context/project/<project-name>/ and copy this file there. See docs/context-layers.md for what belongs at this level.

_instructions.default_branch: Branch that PRs/MRs target. Overrides org default if set.
_instructions.board_project_option_id: The option ID for this project on the board's Project field.
_instructions.project_instructions_file: File in the project repo root with agent instructions (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, etc.).
_instructions.project_path: Absolute path to the project repo on the machine. Can be overridden at user level.
_instructions.notes_directory: Directory inside the project repo for agent notes and evidence. Must be gitignored in the project repo.
_instructions.spec_directory: Where design specs are stored relative to project root.
_instructions.plan_directory: Where implementation plans are stored relative to project root.
_instructions.test_commands: Commands to run tests per area.
_instructions.coverage_thresholds: Minimum coverage per area. Overrides org default.
_instructions.skills: Optional skill frameworks for each phase.
